exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Lie on a flat bench and grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width, then press it from your chest until your arms are extended.
exercises.instructions: Retract and depress the shoulder blades, keep feet planted; lower under control and avoid excessive arching or bouncing off the chest.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Seated or standing, hold dumbbells at shoulder level and press overhead until arms are nearly extended, then lower slowly.
exercises.instructions: Brace the core and avoid leaning back; keep elbows unlocked and control the dumbbell path throughout.

exercises.name: Pull-up
exercises.description: Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulders and pull your body up until your chin clears the bar, then lower under control.
exercises.instructions: Initiate by depressing the shoulders and engaging the back, then pull the elbows down; avoid swinging and keep tension on the way down.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.description: With the bar on your upper back and feet shoulder-width apart, hinge and bend the knees to squat until thighs are about parallel, then stand up.
exercises.instructions: Keep knees tracking over toes and spine neutral; inhale on the descent, exhale as you stand.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand behind the bar with feet hip-width apart, hinge at the hips to grip the bar, and drive through the hips to lift it along the legs to a standing position.
exercises.instructions: Engage the lats and core before lifting and keep the bar close to the body; avoid rounding the back or over-extending at lockout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Standing with dumbbells hanging at your sides, curl them up toward the shoulders by bending the elbows, then lower slowly.
exercises.instructions: Keep elbows pinned at your sides and avoid swinging; pause briefly at the top to feel the biceps contract.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Pushdown
exercises.description: Facing the cable machine, hold the attachment at chest height and, keeping the elbows fixed, push it down until the arms are extended.
exercises.instructions: Keep the upper arms against the body and still, moving only the forearms; control the tension on the return.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.description: Support your body on your forearms and toes, holding a straight line from head to heels in a static hold.
exercises.instructions: Brace the abs and glutes, avoid sagging the hips or shrugging the shoulders; breathe evenly and hold for the set duration.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Rest your forearms on your thighs or a bench with palms up holding dumbbells, then curl the weight using only the wrists and lower it back.
exercises.instructions: Keep the movement isolated to the wrists with a small, controlled range; avoid going too heavy to prevent compensation.

exercises.name: Suspension Row
exercises.description: Hold the suspension trainer handles and lean back with a straight body, then bend the elbows to pull your chest toward the handles and return under control.
exercises.instructions: Keep the core braced and body in a straight line throughout; retract the shoulder blades first, then pull with the elbows.
